findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The bold emphasis on 'Everyone' in the Commission Members chat warning paragraph is missing in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'make sure you use the default option in the chat box to chat with **Everyone**' (bold). HTML: 'chat with Everyone' (no bold/emphasis).
